name: The Tiyana unit vietnamese sdd
description:
Our double drawn (SDD) Vietnamese Bone Straight Hair is sourced directly from healthy donors in Vietnam. Every strand is thick from top to tip, giving you a full, luscious look with no thinning ends. 
 100% raw & unprocessed ,no chemicals, pure bone straight finish ,sleek, silky, and ultra-smooth 
 Super Full Ends – Minimal to no short strands for maximum volume 
 Long-Lasting Quality – Reusable for years with proper care 
 Tangle free because you deserve hassle free glam. Whether you’re looking to slay daily or turn heads on a special occasion, this hair is a statement of luxury and confidence. 
  Unit Details :   
 Grade : 14a 
 Material : Vietnamese super double drawn  
 Closure  : 2x6 and 5x5 
 Colour : Brown  
 Length : 18”  
 Type : Factory made

name: The Lara unit
description:
Elevate your look effortlessly with the  Wavy Bouncy Human hair  crafted from  100% premium human hair  for softness, volume, and natural movement. This beautifully constructed wig features a gorgeous wavy texture that stays full, bouncy, and lightweight—perfect for everyday wear or special occasions. 
 Designed for comfort and realism, the wig offers a natural-looking hairline, secure fit, and a luxurious, silky finish that mimics the look and feel of real, healthy hair. Enjoy stunning waves with minimal effort and maximum versatility. 
  Features  
 
 
  100% Human Hair  – soft, natural, and long-lasting 
 
 
  Wavy & Bouncy Texture  – full of body with beautiful movement 
 
 
  Pre-Made Wig Construction  – easy to wear and style 
 
 
  Natural Hairline  – realistic finish for seamless blending 
 
 
  Lightweight & Breathable Cap  – comfortable for all-day wear 
 
 
  Heat-Style Friendly  – curl or restyle as desired 
 
 
  Minimal Shedding & Tangle-Free  – high-quality craftsmanship 
 
 
  Can Be Washed & Reused  – maintains its beauty after multiple wears

name: The Bomb  6x5 glueless Wig
description:
Our Water curls are   premium luxury hair   that is designed for the bold, the beautiful, and those who settle for nothing less than flawless.   
 Crafted from 100% premium virgin human hair, this hair offers maximum thickness, incredible volume, and natural luster that radiates elegance. The super double drawn quality ensures that over 90% of the hairs are the same length, giving you that full, rich look without thinning ends    
  Water Curl Texture   – Soft, juicy curls that are easy to manage, hold their shape beautifully, and bounce with every move. Perfect for that wet-and-wavy look that never goes out of style.     
  The 6x5   Lace Closure   – Offers a realistic scalp look with a generous parting space, blending seamlessly into your natural hairline for a flawless melt.     
 Why You’ll Love It:    
 
 
   Super full, luxurious, and soft to the touch 
 
 
   Perfect for glam, everyday wear, or special occasions 
 
 
   Can be colored, straightened, or styled to your desire 
 
 
   Durable lace with minimal maintenance required 
 
 
  Treat yourself to the ultimate in hair excellence. With our   26”  Super Double Drawn Water Curls 6x5 Closure  , every day is a good hair day.  
  Hair Type: Premium virgin hair  Length : 26” closure size: 6x5  
  Factory made

name: The Lavender Luxe wig
description:
Turn heads effortlessly with the Shara Hair Premium Virgin Hair Full Frontal Body Wave Wig — the perfect combination of luxury, softness, and flawless versatility. 
 Made from 100% premium virgin hair, this unit delivers exceptional silkiness, durability, and a beautiful natural flow that moves just like your own. The gorgeous ash-blonde shade adds a cool, modern radiance that flatters every complexion — ideal for elevating your everyday style or creating a striking look for any occasion. 
 Featuring a full frontal lace design, this wig offers a seamless hairline from ear to ear, blending smoothly into your skin for an ultra-natural, scalp-like finish. The breathable cap and secure construction provide comfort and confidence, while the body wave texture gives you effortless volume, bounce, and styling flexibility. 
 ✔️ Premium virgin hair — soft, full, and luxuriously smooth ✔️ Full frontal lace — realistic hairline, versatile parting, and beginner-friendly ✔️ Ash-blonde tone — chic, cool-toned, and universally flattering ✔️ Body wave texture — voluminous, glamorous, and easy to style 
 Whether you're aiming for soft glam, everyday confidence, or a fresh new vibe, this ash-blonde body wave wig from Shara Hair delivers beauty and boldness with every wear. 
  Hair Type:  Premium virgin hair  Length:  24inch and 266inch  Lace Type:   13x6 Full frontal  Construction:  Factory made

attributes.length: 24inch and 266inch  Lace Type:   13x6 Full frontal  Construction:  Factory made

name: The platinum whisper bob wig
description:
Elevate your look with the luxurious shine and sophistication of our 14” Platinum Bob . Crafted with a 6x5 Premium Virgin Hair lace top, this unit delivers unmatched quality, realism, and styling versatility. The soft, silky strands offer a flawless platinum tone that’s vibrant, dimensional, and beautifully cool-toned without brassiness. 
 Designed for effortless wear, this bob features: 
 ✨ Premium Virgin Hair – Pure, cuticle-aligned strands that are long-lasting, tangle-free, and ultra-soft. ✨ 6x5 Lace Area – A spacious, breathable lace top that creates natural parting options and a scalp-realistic finish. ✨ 14-Inch Blunt Bob Cut – Chic, modern, and universally flattering with a sleek flow and sharp movement. ✨ Pre-Plucked & Natural Hairline – No customization needed for a seamless melt. ✨ Heat & Style Friendly – Curl it, straighten it, or add waves while maintaining a smooth platinum glow. 
 Perfect for everyday glam or a bold style switch, this platinum bob brings premium luxury and a stunning high-fashion look straight out of the box. 
  Hair Type:   Premium virgin hair   Length:   14”   Lace Type:   6x5   Construction:   Factory made

name: The Hazel wig
description:
Elevate your look with our 24-inch 6×5 Brown Body-Wave Premium Virgin Hair Wig .Crafted for those who value luxury, longevity, and effortless beauty. This factory-made masterpiece features 100% virgin human hair, offering unmatched softness, natural movement, and a silky body-wave texture that holds beautifully with or without heat styling. 
 The 6×5 upgraded lace area provides a more realistic scalp appearance, increased parting versatility, and a seamless melt into any skin tone. Its rich chocolate-brown hue adds dimension and warmth, giving you a naturally radiant finish. 
 Engineered for comfort, the wig includes an adjustable cap, secure combs, and a breathable construction ideal for all-day wear. Whether you’re going for everyday elegance or a glamorous transformation, this premium Arabella unit delivers stunning results with zero fuss. 
  Features  
 
 
  Length:  24inch and 26inch  
 
 
  Texture:  Body Wave 
 
 
  Color:  Natural Brown 
 
 
  Hair Quality:  100% Premium Virgin Human Hair 
 
 
  Lace Size:  6×5 for natural parting & realistic hairline and 13x6 Full Frontal  
 
 
  Construction:  Factory-made with breathable, comfortable cap design 
 
 
  Styling:  Heat-safe, dye-friendly, minimal shedding, and tangle-resistant 
 
 
  Longevity:  Designed to last with proper care 
 
 
  Density:  Full and voluminous for a luxurious look

name: The Boss B Bob SDD
description:
Our Glueless Super Double Drawn Bobs are perfect for those looking for a stylish, easy-to-style look. It's extremely suitable for professional, casual and entertainment settings, this unit's versatility is perfect to complete any look you're going for and will NEVER fail you! 
 Benefits of our Glueless Super Double Drawn Unit: 
 - guaranteed to last you numerous years. Up to 3-5 years with standard maintenance 
 - extremely natural looking hairline, especially when used with melting spray. 
 Crafted from Double Drawn, this supreme quality 4x4 simply stunning! This wig is part of our Premium Wigs Collection. 
 Unit Details : 
 Grade : Super Double Drawn   Closure : 4x4-Glueless 
 Colour : 1/Brown 
 Length : 10” 
 Wig stitching : Factory made   Recommended product : straight maintenance kit 
 N.B. Please be aware that for coloured units, its important to use. a colour-protecting shampoo to maintain the texture and heat protecting spray when straightening

name: Clearance : The Solange Double Drawn Curly Wig
description:
The first of our double drawn curly hair range, The Solange wig, part of  Premium Wigs Collection , is perfect for those who simply love volume in their wigs. Double drawn for uniform thickness throughout, this ensure that the unit has  more volume than other normal single drawn wigs!  
   Crafted from high-quality Malaysian hair, this pre-styled wig  also comes with a full frontal lace, giving you lots of variations and styling options to try!  
 Benefits of the Solange unit : 
 
 voluminous, being a double drawn curly wig, this unit has significantly more volume than normal curly wigs 
 full frontal closure ensures a stunning natural look, when installed as well different hairstyle/styling options 
 sourced from high quality hair, it will last you for years especially when taken care of. 
 
  Unit Details  :  
 Grade : 13a 
 Material : Malaysian 
 Closure : Frontal 
 Style : Double Drawn   
 Length : 12inch - 20inch

name: The Ivy 14a unit
description:
The Ivy Unit  
 Our 14a Bodywave Peruvian Wig is perfect for those looking for a stylish, easy-to-style look. 
 It's extremely suitable for professional, casual and entertainment settings, this unit's versatility is perfect to complete any look you're going for and will NEVER fail you! 
 Our gaurantee: 
 14a 
 Lifetime guarantee (with the right care) refer to hair care guide for maintenance tips 
 **7-Day Satisfaction Guarantee:** If you're not completely satisfied with your wig, you can return it within 7 days of purchase for an exchange no questions asked. 
 2. **Quality Assurance:** Each wig undergoes rigorous quality checks to ensure it meets our high standards. We guarantee that your wig will be free from manufacturing defects. 
 3. **you can open a line/parting on any part of the closure on the Frontal and Frontal HD 
 4.**frontals allow you to tie a ponytail for different looks, extremely natural looking hairline, especially when used with melting spray. 
 Crafted from Grade 14a Peruvian Bodywave Hair, this supreme quality frontal bob simply stunning! This wig is part of our Frontal Wigs & Premium Wigs Collection. 
   Unit Details :   
 Grade : 14a 
 Volume : Extra Bundle 
 Material : Peruvian 
 Lace : Frontal, Frontal HD and 6x6  
 Colour : Natural Colour and Bleached
